_comment: Research facts for session-project-lock. No training runs (tooling project), so runs_glob/direction_regex are empty by design -- the search-tree/lint degrades cleanly to no nodes. candidate_moves = remaining build steps; trunk_checks = cheapest tests that could invalidate the design.
trunk_checks: two concurrent sessions (different session_id) resolve to DIFFERENT projects, no clobber
a session whose cwd is inside project X's home resolves to X (not the last-planned project)
an unbound session with no cwd match resolves to '' and the compass stays silent
after remove-global: grep the tree -> no .active-project WRITE remains
candidate_moves: backfill home for every existing project (asr_rewrite/kimi/...) from its known code dir
ship /trainlint:use <name> to bind the current session to a project by name
rewire paths.active_project() to the session-lock -> cwd/home resolution order (transitional global fallback)
drop the global .active-project fallback + its writer (final remove-global cut)
